conditional_surface_status: conditional-support for the Schur route only after complete 63/63 rows, isolated-pole K'(pole) or equivalent derivative authority, FV/IR limiting control, and canonical O_H/source-overlap or same-source W/Z response authority are supplied
exact_next_action: Use the complete finite packet only as staging support.  For closure, replace finite inverse rows with isolated-pole K'(pole)/A'B'C' authority or add canonical O_H/source-overlap or W/Z response authority.

parent_statuses.campaign_status: open / active campaign continuing after current shortcut blocks
parent_statuses.retained_route: open / retained closure not yet reached
parent_statuses.schur_abc_definition: exact negative boundary / Schur A/B/C definition not derivable from current PR230 source-only surface
parent_statuses.schur_kernel_contract: open / Schur kernel row contract gate not passed; current rows absent
parent_statuses.schur_sufficiency: exact-support / Schur-complement K-prime sufficiency theorem; current rows absent
parent_statuses.two_source_schur_kprime_finite_shell_sco: bounded-support / finite-shell Schur inverse-slope scout from two-source taste-radial rows; strict K-prime pole authority absent
parent_statuses.two_source_schur_subblock_witness: bounded-support / two-source taste-radial Schur-subblock witness; strict Schur K-prime pole rows and canonical O_H authority absent

proposal_allowed_reason: The runner computes finite inverse rows from measured C_ss/C_sx/C_xx blocks.  These rows are not the strict neutral-kernel A/B/C pole-row packet and cannot provide closure without pole/FV/IR and canonical bridge authority.

row_definition.strict_limit: These are finite inverse-correlator-block rows on the measured source/complement chart.  They are not strict Schur kernel rows at an isolated scalar pole and do not identify x with O_H.

strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not treat finite inverse rows as strict neutral-kernel A/B/C pole rows
does not treat finite shell differences as isolated-pole K'(pole)
does not treat taste-radial x as canonical O_H
does not set kappa_s = 1, c2 = 1, or Z_match = 1
does not use H_unit, yt_ward_identity, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, or u0
